creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/doc/commit/?id=a0f7ad455b656e4049376a67d94457d43fa18b39

commit a0f7ad455b656e4049376a67d94457d43fa18b39
Author:     Ceri Davies <ceri@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2021-02-22 18:28:19 +0000
Commit:     Daniel Ebdrup Jensen <debdrup@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2021-02-22 18:29:41 +0000

    Multiple files: Fix 'shared' references

    The hier(7) man-page lists /usr/share as the location for
    architecture-independent files, so fix a few instances where the
    documentation referes to /usr/shared instead of /usr/share.

    PR:             253760
